---
title: "The Adventures of a Pincushion, Designed Chiefly for the use of Young Ladies"
---

## The Adventures of a Pincushion, Designed Chiefly for the use of Young Ladies

**Author:** Mary Ann Kilner
**Date:** <i>c.</i> 1780
**Imprint:** London: Marshall

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
